detail: Scale §8 is always permanent. 'next-attack' contradicts rules.
Text says 'until end of next turn from equip'. Anchor to equip turn.
Text says 'esta carta' (the Protector itself). Reflect self-duration.
Text says 'hasta que esta carta este disponible' (Nephtis itself, not the Protector).
Text says 'hasta disponible' = while Nirge itself is available.
Pasiva activates while card is IN Extinction, not on field.
Text says 'hasta el final de TU siguiente turno'. Change to until-end-of-next-own-turn.
cant-negate-activa is permanent mandatory restriction, not optional.
'Ningun Adendei puede ser curado' is permanent non-optional restriction.
Effect is in bold (mandatory Pasiva). Remove optional:true.
No 'puede' in text. Mandatory Pasiva. Remove optional:true.
No 'puede' in effect_text. Effect is mandatory on reveal.
Continuous aura Pasiva is not optional. Remove optional:true.
No 'puedes' in text. Effect is mandatory. Remove optional:true.
'Dana 1 punto adicional' is temporary turn-bonus, not permanent scale §8.
Effect is 'return Ixim from field to Zona de Equipo' — direction was inverted.
Should be restriction cant-receive-rests-by-effect, not no-rest.
Add cant-receive-rests-by-effect restriction to replace no-rest operation.
Text: rival cannot DECLARE equip effects. Pre-declaration restriction, not post-declaration negate.
Conditional damage while burned is not permanent scale. Use damage-bonus with condition.
Text grants immunity to receiving damage (not full protect). Use damage-immunity.
Effect is 'return Rot to Zona de Equipo', not equip from it.
Effect is 'send Protector to Protector zone as available' - not vivify §15.
Standing restriction on drawn card effects this turn, not per-effect negation.
'gasta' means Cyra drains 6 PV as cost. Pipeline omits Cyra PV drain. Add to costs[].
Zone swap §12: cards keep their stats. Rival card entering your zone keeps its own stats.
Effect says 'atacar adicionalmente' = dano por ataque, not dano por efecto §9.
'Dana 1 punto adicional' is attack bonus, not amplify-effect or scale.
Effect pulls suplente from Mazo (replacement mechanic), not from Extincion §15.
'+1 dano adicional al atacar' is per-attack bonus, not permanent scale §8.
'Fuera del juego' is NOT Extincion — distinct zones. Use send-out-of-game.
Sending Ixim to Extincion is a cost (cost_text), not a free operation. Move to costs[].
Text says full immunity to effect damage, not partial reduction. Use grant-immunity.
Conditional attack bonus vs burned targets is NOT permanent scale §8. Use conditional-damage-bonus.
'Dana 1 pto. adicional' vs resting targets = Dano Adicional §9, not permanent scale §8.

new_value: operation.type=scale confirmed correct. 'Aumenta 1 pto. de dano' = permanent Escalar §8.
detail: Semantic report confirmed scale is correct here. Documentation note only.
'Dana 1 punto adicional por cada Abisal' is dynamic per-attack bonus, not permanent scale-per.
Text says 'Esta carta no puede ser curada' = cant-be-healed (not cant-heal-by-own-effects).
Text: 'no puede recibir descansos por efecto'. cant-rest-update = cant decrement descansos — wrong.
Text: rival cards cannot 'escalar'. Should be cant-scale, not cant-rest-update.
Effect prevents attacking the FACING card, not specifically the Protector.
Restriction prevents targeting linked Adendei this turn, not preventing linking itself.
Text: 'solo pueden ser curados por efectos de Adendei'. Allowed-source restriction, not blocked-source.
Permanent cant-heal on own Protector needs separate standing pipeline (not just inside Activa P1).
Effect says 'Puede seleccionar' — optional. Add optional:true to modifiers.
Condition is 'if the ATTACKED card is not revealed', not self. Change to target-hidden.
Text requires equip in Zona de Equipo (not equipped on card).
Condition is 'while in descanso'. self-available means 0 rests (ready) — opposite of intended.
Cost: 'No puedes usar si hay carta aliada en descanso'. Condition is about ally rest state.
Text says 'Adendei abismado' (has Abismar mark/status), NOT Adendei of subtype Abisal.
Condition is self being protected, not available. Use self-has-status with status:protected.

Restrictions are unconditional per text. Remove min-ext-type prerequisite from P2.

Separate targets: rival receives +2 rests, ally gets -2 rests. Targets must be distinct.
